case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS CHARLOT CAROLYN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $311.85 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLOT CAROLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
